H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=95, strong confidence (mean=7.15, std=1.78). Highest sample size with unimodal distribution (7-8 scores). Settle times distributed 5-10 minutes. AutoGluon prediction (6.86) slightly below observed. YouTube reach highest in HEALING (30 views) with NULL retention data.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Reliable unwinding for overstimulation with noticeable effects across 95 listeners.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=51, strong confidence (mean=6.92, std=1.73). Tight distribution at 6-8 (71% of responses). Mixed improvement ratings with 24-hour activity spread. AutoGluon prediction matches observed closely.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Consistent calming effect though slightly less pronounced than L1.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=47, meaningful confidence (mean=7.04, std=1.68). Sleep contexts dominate (35%) with rapid settlement. Panel notes distinct use case from L1/L2. Predicted score slightly below observed mean.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Helps many settle, especially when used for sleep preparation.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=67, strong confidence (mean=7.22, std=1.93). Qualitative data shows 63% positive change with settle times 5-10 minutes. Cross-bucket routing to X-ME-L1 suggested by AutoGluon. YouTube reach minimal (7 views). Panel consensus on strong signal despite low reach.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most listeners experience relief from anxiety within minutes, though depth varies.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=48, meaningful confidence (mean=6.94, std=1.62). Faster settlement than L1 (45% at 5 minutes). Neutral music opinions higher (25%) than L1. AutoGluon predicted score 7.838 slightly exceeds observed. YouTube views critically low at 6.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Quick calming effect for many, though some find the music less engaging.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=36, meaningful confidence (mean=7.08, std=1.89). Highest caregiver usage (30%) and longest settle times (50% at 10+ minutes). AutoGluon prediction exceeds observed by 0.76. Panel notes deeper but slower entrainment pattern.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Deeper relaxation possible but takes longer to settle for most listeners.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=43, meaningful confidence (mean=6.35, std=1.70). Crisis protocol within expected range with 33% significant improvement reports. Rapid settlement (54% within 5 minutes) despite moderate aggregate score. Music opinions strongly positive.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Helps many in crisis feel better quickly despite moderate average scores.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=33, meaningful confidence (mean=6.52, std=1.70). Polarized music opinions (38% neutral, 31% loved). Predicted score (7.96) substantially exceeds observed. Panel converges on adviser routing adjustment recommendation.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Mixed reactions - some crisis listeners improve significantly, others feel neutral.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=27, meaningful confidence (mean=6.52, std=1.91). Fastest settlement (63% within 5 minutes) but lowest positive percentage (52%). 21% report negative impact - highest in crisis tier. Panel flags potential population mismatch.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Fastest settlement but most polarized outcomes - works very well or not at all.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=54, strong confidence (mean=7.19, std=1.86). Highest mean in SL tier with rapid settlement (53% within 5 minutes). AutoGluon cross-bucket routing to X-ME protocols noted.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Strong sleep aid properties with rapid effects for most listeners.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=45, meaningful confidence (mean=7.09, std=1.55). Unique listener population: 40% client/patient (inverse of typical). Long settle times (47% at 10+ minutes). Rhythm opinions show first 'too busy' responses.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Particularly effective for caregivers supporting others' sleep needs.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=28, meaningful confidence (mean=7.07, std=1.68). Developing signal with balanced improvement reports. Rapid settlement despite moderate drift (0.686). Music opinions show notable neutrality (27%).
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Reliable sleep support with varied listener experiences.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=41, meaningful confidence (mean=6.46, std=1.82). Below AutoGluon's top focus prediction (T-FC-L3: 7.73). Rapid settlement (54% within 5 minutes). Minimal YouTube reach (5 views).
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Solid focus enhancement for most listeners though not the series strongest.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=32, meaningful confidence (mean=7.19, std=1.60). Therapy contexts noted (31%). Settle times split between 5-10 minutes. Slightly below AutoGluon's top focus prediction.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Notable clarity improvements during therapy and caregiving situations.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=35, meaningful confidence (mean=7.63, std=1.97). Series-high mean with balanced improvement reports. Highest YouTube views in THRIVING (16). Predicted score matches observed closely.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Top performer in focus protocols with strong listener feedback.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=34, meaningful confidence (mean=6.74, std=1.73). Slight improvement dominant with immediate settlement (29%). No specific AutoGluon prediction available. YouTube views minimal at 2.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Promising creative support with room for more data collection.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=24, meaningful confidence (mean=6.79, std=1.41). Balanced improvement reports with settle times 5-10 minutes. Modest YouTube reach at 2 views.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Balanced creative boosting with noticeable improvement for many.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=18, developing confidence (mean=7.28, std=1.32). Highest mean in creative flow tier with 67% positive. Balanced improvement reports. YouTube views higher at 7.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Highest creative flow ratings in THRIVING series despite low n.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=25, meaningful confidence (mean=7.04, std=1.34). Balanced listener types with moderate improvement. Settle often 20 minutes (36%). Predicted score (7.69) slightly exceeds observed.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Balanced maintenance support with mostly positive experiences.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=22, meaningful confidence (mean=6.68, std=2.03). Balanced improvement reports with varied settlement. Predicted score (7.69) exceeds observed.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Moderate benefits noted but with more variable response patterns.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=14, developing confidence (mean=6.93, std=1.73). Balanced improvement reports. Predicted score (7.69) exceeds observed. Panel flags protocol refinement potential.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Promising balance effects that warrant further investigation.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=39, meaningful confidence (mean=6.74, std=1.94). Moderate improvement reports with 20-minute settle times. Predicted score (8.23) slightly exceeds observed. Music widely liked.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Balanced mood and energy support with primarily positive reports.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=25, meaningful confidence (mean=6.76, std=1.71). Significant improvement reports (48%). Settle often 20 minutes. Predicted score (8.23) modestly exceeds observed.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Strong mood elevation with significant improvement for many.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=18, developing confidence (mean=6.28, std=1.74). Mixed improvement data with rapid settlement. Predicted score (8.23) exceeds observed. Panel notes mood subgroup potential.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed energy effects suggest potential mood subgroup differences.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=22, meaningful confidence (mean=6.36, std=2.01). Balanced improvement reports with rapid settlement. Predicted score (7.88) exceeds observed. Panel suggests motivational redesign.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Solid motivational support with room for optimization.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=14, developing confidence (mean=6.21, std=1.63). Underperforms relative to motivation prediction. Settle times vary. YouTube views at 7.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Moderate motivational enhancement with varied settlement experiences.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=13, developing confidence (mean=7.15, std=2.38). Bimodal outcomes with 62% positive vs. 15% negative. High variance suggests subgroup effect. Predicted score (7.88) exceeds observed. Panel divided on signal reliability.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Highest motivational ratings but with notable variation in response.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: VOL001: n=24, meaningful confidence (mean=6.75, std=1.62). Balanced listener types with 42% significant improvement. Settle time ~10 minutes. Predicted score (7.54) exceeds observed.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Reliable mental clarity support with balanced listener reports.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: VOL001: n=16, developing confidence (mean=6.81, std=1.64). Significant improvement reports (44%). Quick settlement (38% immediate). Predicted score matches observed closely.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Good mind-clearing effects for many listeners despite low n.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: VOL001: n=10, developing confidence (mean=5.7, std=2.45). Low mean with high variance. 20% negative impact reports (2 'worse'). Predicted score (7.54) substantially exceeds observed. Panel flags high uncertainty.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Most variable outcomes in clarity protocols - works extremely well or not for different listeners.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The data suggests HEALING protocols achieve reliable efficacy with low variance, THRIVING shows moderate elevation, and TRANSFORMING exhibits higher spread consistent with ascending-arc design.
• HEALING leads in consistency with std=1.77 across 574 responses.
• THRIVING achieves series-high mean=7.63 in T-FC-L3 with n=35.
• TRANSFORMING shows expected spread (std=1.87) but 15% underperformance signals.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Divergent patterns emerge aligned with protocol architecture.
• HEALING protocols exhibit tight variance (std=1.77) with 11/12 protocols at strong/meaningful confidence.
• THRIVING shows series-high mean=7.63 in focus protocols but 30% lower n than HEALING.
• TRANSFORMING displays bimodal response patterns with 3 protocols showing notable drift.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Notable deviations from expected patterns.
• X-MC-L3 shows low mean=5.7 with high std=2.45 and 2 'worse' reports.
• H-CR-L2 demonstrates high drift (0.634) and predicted score (7.96) exceeding observed (6.52).
• Bimodal distributions suggest population splits requiring investigation.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Actionable protocol development directions.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] H-CR-L2: Adjust adviser routing given 53% early drop-off in qualitative data.
• X-MD-L3: Investigate motivation subgroups; 15% negative change ratings suggest population mismatch.
• H-OS-L1: Expand reach despite strong efficacy (7.15 mean with only 30 views).
• T-FC-L3: Pilot scaled release given high mean (7.63) and YouTube views (16).
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding analysis reveals evolving patterns and consistent clusterings.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: 22/30 protocols show notable drift, especially crisis/overstim protocols.
• SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: High similarity pairs confirm internal consistency (sim=0.88 average).
• Confidence: Drift metrics based on limited runs; interpret as exploratory signals.
